name: iobroker.ems
description: EMS V2 execution gateway for ioBroker (dryrun/live, audit)

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test build/learning/pv_bias/math.test.js build/learning/pv_bias/freeze.test.js build/learning/pv_bias/history.test.js build/learning/pv_horizon/math.test.js build/learning/weather/math.test.js build/learning/price_learning/math.test.js build/learning/price_forecast/math.test.js build/learning/house_load/math.test.js build/learning/thermal_runtime/math.test.js build/learning/battery_runtime/math.test.js
